name: Rudy Rutherford
abstract: Elman H. "Rudy" Rutherford (June 18, 1924 – March 31, 1995) was an American jazz saxophonist and clarinetist.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Benny Carter and Illinois Jacquet

about_quotes.speaker: Arnett Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: I played baritone and tenor in the band... when Rudy come back to the band

about_quotes.speaker: Ram Ramirez
about_quotes.evidence: I had a group there with Rudy Rutherford, Ronnie Coles and (?) Richardson.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: And I also met Rudy Rutherford, who was a fine clarinetist, around that time.
